hero.title: FACTORY TOUR & CRAFTSMANSHIP
hero.heading: FROM RAW BLOCK TO FINISHED PRODUCT
hero.description: Walk Through Our Workshop — Marble Cutting, Waterjet Inlay, CNC Profiling, Polishing, Dry Lay, Inspection, And Export Packing.

facilities.title: MARBLE SLAB LINE
facilities.desc: Diamond Saws, Slab Calibration, Polishing, And Numbered Batch Records Help Us Track Quarry Source, Color Range, And Slab Identity.

facilities.title: WATERJET MEDALLION CENTER
facilities.desc: High-Pressure Waterjet Cutting Enables Precise Inlay Patterns. Each Medallion Is Dry-Laid And Checked Against The Drawing Before Packing.

facilities.title: CNC PROFILING & SHAPING
facilities.desc: CNC Carving, Profiled Edges, Columns, Moldings, And Shaped Pieces Can Be Produced From Drawings With Repeatable Accuracy.

facilities.title: QUALITY CONTROL CENTER
facilities.desc: Color Range Control, Thickness Checks, Six-Side Inspection, Dry Laying, Surface Protection, And Export Packing Are Built Into Our Workflow.
